title: T 61 Security Supply Chain
summary: Harden the checked-in CodeGraph helper scripts so they default to loopback-only access and stop using baked-in default credentials.
acceptance_criteria: Start from the controlling plan docs/exec-plans/active/61-t-wave-8-repo-security-and-supply-chain-hardening.md before broader repo exploration.

Keep the scope anchored to the requested files: docs/exec-plans/active/61-t-wave-8-repo-security-and-supply-chain-hardening.md, scripts/codegraph-start-db.sh, scripts/codegraph-import.sh, scripts/codegraph-index-export.sh.
Run the first validation command: rg -n '0.0.0.0:3004|root --pass root' scripts/codegraph-*.sh, then confirm the scripts remain bash-parseable.
Deliver the expected outcome: Harden the checked-in CodeGraph helper scripts so they default to loopback-only access and stop using baked-in default credentials..
validation: bash -n scripts/codegraph-start-db.sh && bash -n scripts/codegraph-import.sh && bash -n scripts/codegraph-index-export.sh
